title: selinum nitidum
intro: Selinum nitidum, also known as the glossy carrot fern or glossy chervil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and improving respiratory health. Selinum nitidum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in salads and as a garnish, although its preparation and usage should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
